title: Comparisons with known result
body:
Here is a code that can be optimised to wires.
```
module never_equal (a, b, x, y);
input [3:0] a, b;
output x, y;
    assign x = ({a[0], a[0], a[0], a[0]} == 4'b1010);
    assign y = ({a[0], a[0], b[0], b[0]} == 4'b1010);
endmodule

```
```
=== never_equal ===

   Number of wires:                  4
   Number of wire bits:             10
   Number of public wires:           4
   Number of public wire bits:      10
   Number of memories:               0
   Number of memory bits:            0
   Number of processes:              0
   Number of cells:                  2
     $eq                             2

```
